name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — standard terms for mutual confidentiality obligations between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, including key variables like purpose, term, and governing law.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement for SaaS and cloud service subscriptions between providers and customers.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments, service credits, and support response times.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage product collaborations between vendors and design partners.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for consulting, implementation, and other professional services engagements.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement for GDPR-compliant data processing between controllers and processors.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for establishing formal business partnerships between companies.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise or downloadable software licensing.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for trial or evaluation periods of products and services.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA-compliant handling of protected health information.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum addressing artificial intelligence and machine learning usage terms as a supplement to existing agreements.
